name: Speedy Ravioli Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Cook the ravioli in a large saucepan or Dutch oven until heated through, as directed on the package. Drain and set aside.
3. Add the spaghetti sauce and basil to the same pan. Heat over medium for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Stir in the cooked ravioli. Transfer to an ungreased 13 x 9-inch glass baking dish.
5. Sprinkle with shredded mozzarella cheese.
6. Bake at 400°F for 10 minutes or until the sauce is bubbling and the cheese is melted.
6 servings
